titleEn: Horsch enters into partnership with application map specialist
titleZh: 赫氏与施药地图专家达成战略合作
summaryZh: 德国农机巨头赫氏战略入股施药地图专家Sam-Dimension，该公司利用1毫米分辨率无人机影像和AI系统生成精准施药地图，支持洋葱、马铃薯、胡萝卜等多种作物的点喷除草，作业效率达60公顷/小时，且兼容多家主流喷雾机品牌。此举标志着精准农业领域又一重要技术整合。
translationZh:
机械制造商赫氏已战略入股德国公司Sam-Dimension。Sam-Dimension专注于利用无人机影像生成施药地图，用于杂草点喷。这两家公司自2019年起便已开展合作。

据该公司介绍，Sam-Dimension开发了一款分辨率达1毫米的特殊相机。利用这些相机图像，Sam-Dimension的AI系统“Sam-Cam AI”可生成施药地图，并将其加载到田间喷雾机中，使其转变为点喷式喷雾机。据Sam-Dimension称，其系统作业能力可达每小时60公顷。

**多种作物适用**
Sam-Dimension的系统适用于大量作物，例如洋葱、马铃薯、胡萝卜和甜菜，以及“绿上褐”应用场景。这些施药地图可用于任何配备GPS控制分区功能的田间喷雾机。除赫氏外，Sam-Dimension的施药地图还兼容Amazone、约翰迪尔、Hardi和Agrifac等品牌的喷雾机。
featuredReason: 该合作展示了AI与无人机影像在精准植保中的落地应用，对智慧畜牧行业中的饲草料作物（如玉米、甜菜）的杂草管理具有直接参考价值，体现了跨领域精准农业技术的融合趋势。
contentFull: Horsch enters into partnership with application map specialist 24-06 | Smart farming | NewsMachinery manufacturer Horsch has taken a strategic stake in the German application map specialist Sam-Dimension. Photo: HorschMachinery manufacturer Horsch has taken a strategic stake in the German company Sam-Dimension. Sam-Dimension specialises in supplying application maps created using drone imagery for spot spraying against weeds. The 2 companies have already been working together since 2019.Sam-Dimension has developed a special camera with a resolution of 1 millimetre, according to the specialist itself. Using these camera images, Sam-Dimension’s AI system, Sam-Cam AI, creates an application map that can be loaded into a field sprayer to turn it into a spot sprayer. According to Sam-Dimension, its system has a capacity of 60 hectares per hour.Many different cropsSam-Dimension’s system works in a large number of crops, such as onions, potatoes, carrots and beet, and for green-on-brown applications. The application maps can be used on any field sprayer with GPS-controlled section control. In addition to Horsch, Sam-Dimension’s application maps also work with sprayers from Amazone, John Deere, Hardi and Agrifac, among others.
